name: antigravity-bridge
description: Bridge Codex to local Antigravity CLI for planning, review, and delegated rescue work.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate planning, review, and rescue work from Codex to Antigravity CLI
interface.longDescription: Antigravity Bridge lets Codex invoke local Antigravity CLI for architecture planning, code review, adversarial review, and explicitly write-enabled delegated tasks while keeping plan and review commands read-only.
defaultPrompt: Ask Antigravity to plan this architecture
Ask Antigravity to review my current changes
Ask Antigravity to fix this issue
